nasb.text: Awake, drunkards, and weep; And wail, all you wine drinkers, On account of the sweet wine That is cut off from your mouth.

esv.text: Awake, you drunkards, and weep, and wail, all you drinkers of wine, because of the sweet wine, for it is cut off from your mouth.

cnv.text: 酒醉的人哪！你們要醒過來；要哀哭！ 所有嗜酒的人哪！你們都要為甜酒哀號， 因為甜酒從你們的口裡斷絕了。

ccb.text: 醉汉啊，醒过来哭泣吧！ 贪杯的人啊，哀号吧！ 你们再无美酒可饮了。
